title: Evidence Record
description: One JSONL line per source confirmation per opportunity. Stored at gtm_scout_memory/briefs_data/<brief_id>/evidence/<opportunity_id>.jsonl. Append-only. Loop 7 reads these to compute independent_source_count after source-domain dedup; Loop 9 (adversarial) re-validates against exact_quote. EVERY number, contact, rate, or availability claim used in scoring MUST originate in one of these with a verbatim quote.

signal_class.description: Which discovery class this came from (maps to the source tiers).

feeds_dimension.description: Which scoring dimension(s) this evidence informs.

report_date.description: Date the source data point reflects (publish / post / round / rate-card date).

exact_quote.description: Verbatim excerpt so Loop 9 can re-validate.

verification_status.description: verified = from an authoritative/native source; estimated = third-party estimator (e.g. Social Blade, Similarweb); unverified = could not confirm. ESTIMATED + UNVERIFIED values are flagged in the report and excluded from high-conviction scoring.

cites.description: URLs this record cites — used by Loop 7 for source-cycle dedup.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence the quote supports the claimed signal. <0.7 excluded by Loop 7's independent-source counting.

is_counter_evidence.description: Loop 9 marks adversarial counter-evidence; surfaced in risks but NOT counted toward independent_source_count.
